rulings.Rulings: CONTINUED TO 10-1-02 ON COURT'S OWN MOTION.

rulings.Case Title: MIXON VS CCSF
rulings.Rulings: DEFENDANTS' (HENDERSON & LLOYD) MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT/MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION = GRANT AS TO SEXUAL HARASSMENT AS TO BOTH DEFENDANTS. DEFENDANTS DID NOT ENGAGE IN SEXUALLY HARASSING CONDUCT. GRANT AS TO DISCRIMINATION. SUPERVISORS CANNOT BE LIABLE FOR PERSONNEL DECISIONS UNDER RENO. GRANT AS TO INTENTIONAL INFLICTION OF EMOTIONAL DISTRESS. PERSONNEL DECISIONS, EVEN IF MADE WITH AN IMPROPER MOTIVE, ARE NOT OUTRAGEOUS AS A MATTER OF LAW UNDER JANKEN. DENY AS TO RETALIATION. TRIABLE ISSUE OF FACT WHETHER DEMOTION AND FAILURE TO PROMOTE RETALIATORY. (PB)

rulings.Case Title: MIXON VS CCSF
rulings.Rulings: DEFENDANTS' (CCSF & MUNI) MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT/MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION = GRANT SUMMARY JUDGMENT AS TO MUNI BECAUSE NO SPEARATE LEGAL ENTITY. GRANT SUMMARY ADJUDICATION ON PUNITIVES AS TO CCSF. See Gov't 818. DENY AS TO HARASSMENT. TRIABLE ISSUE OF FACT RE CONTINUING VIOLATION DOCTRINE, AND DEFENDANT'S EFFORTS TO REMEDY CONDUCT. DENY AS TO DISCRIMINATION. TRIABLE ISSUE OF FACT RE LLOYD'S DECISION-MAKING ABILITY AND HER COMMENT DEMONSTRATES DISCRIMINATORY ANIMUS. DENY AS TO RETALIATION. TRIABLE ISSUE OF FACT WHETHER DEMOTION AND FAILURE TO PROMOTE RETALIATORY. DENY AS TO INTENTIONAL INFLICTION OF EMOTIONAL DISTRESS. HARASSMENT OUTRAGEOUS CONDUCT. (PB)

rulings.Case Title: MONTROSE & COMPANY, LLC VS. TOWNSEND WALKER et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Joinder In Notice Of Demurrer And Demurrer To First Amended Complaint
rulings.Rulings: DEMURRER TO THE 4TH CAUSE OF ACTION FOR BREACH OF THE IMPLIED COVENANT OVERRULED. DEMURRER TO THE 2ND AND 3RD CAUSES OF ACTION FOR ABUSE OF PROCESS AND INTERFERENCE SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND, AS THE ACTS THEY ARE BASED ON ARE PRIVILEGED UNDER CCP SECTION 47(B). DEMURRERS TO THE 5TH CAUSE OF ACTION FOR INDEMNITY SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND, AS IT FAILS TO STATE A CAUSE OF ACTION. DEMURRER TO THE 1ST CAUSE OF ACTION FOR UNFAIR TRADE PRACTICES SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND. (JH)
